entries.title: Velociraptor Endpoint DFIR
entries.summary: Endpoint hunting and artifact collection platform used to triage compromised hosts at scale.
entries.recommended_use: Deploy rapid collection pack to isolate command-and-control persistence indicators.

entries.title: TheHive Case Coordination
entries.summary: Case management platform for coordinated SOC workflows and analyst handoff.
entries.recommended_use: Track incident tasks and synchronize containment timelines across tactical teams.

entries.title: Sigma Detection Rules
entries.summary: Portable detection-rule format for rapid hunting and SIEM alignment.
entries.recommended_use: Translate high-confidence ATT&CK detections into sensor-specific queries for active hunts.
